value.found_quote: "You can test the MCP server using the Responses API directly with a request like this one" ... "tools": [ { "type": "mcp", "server_label": "cats", "server_url": "https://777ff573-9947-4b9c-8982-658fa40c7d09-00-3le96u7wsymx.janeway.replit.dev/sse/", "allowed_tools": [ "search", "fetch" ], "require_approval": "never" } ]
value.rationale: The page explicitly demonstrates that remote MCP servers can be specified as tools directly in Responses API requests (using "type": "mcp" in the tools array), and this is used for API-driven deep research (the example uses the "o4-mini-deep-research" model). The guide covers building MCP servers for "chat, deep research, and company knowledge" via API, fully substantiating the claim. The feature is presented as currently active with no preview/beta caveats mentioned.
